name: lifectrl
description: LIFECTRL — AI-powered personal chief of staff

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "bun run --cwd server dev" "bun run --cwd client dev"
scripts.build: bun run --cwd server build && bun run --cwd client build
scripts.start: PORT=3000 NODE_ENV=production bun run --cwd server start
